event.name: UFC Weight Miss Card — Main Event Fighter Missed Weight (March 2026)

context.pre_match_notes: Main event fighter missed weight by 3.5lbs — announced 4 hours before weigh-in window closed. Fighter A: aggressive style, historically strong first-round pressure. Fighter B: endurance-based, strong late rounds. Weight miss signals dehydration, preparation failure, altered body chemistry. SportMind signal: weight miss is categorically different from a team losing a regular game — it compromises physiology AND psychology.

question: Predict the match direction given the weight miss signal. What specific physiological and psychological impacts does SportMind model?

verified_outcome.score: Fighter B won by decision (rounds 3-5 dominated)
verified_outcome.key_variable: weight_miss_modifier — dehydration reduces late-round capacity; Fighter B endurance advantage amplified
